title: Cute Hand Painted Korean Webtoon Illustration
sourceTitle: Outdoor Webtoon Selfie Transform AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable reference selfie transform with reference-aware transformation that keeps identity and pose logic while changing style, setting, wardrobe, or finish. Transform the uploaded photo into a cute hand-painted Korean webtoon illustration of a happy couple taking a selfie outdoors. Soft pastel color palette, round expressive eyes, rosy cheeks, warm smiles, cozy romantic atmosphere, charming doodle elements floating around them (. reference identity preservation. selfie framing Reference Subjects: two people from the uploaded photo. Transformation. Style: cute Korean webtoon couple illustration with clean linework and soft blush shading. Selfie Setting: cozy cafe window selfie with warm reflections and subtle phone framing. Wardrobe Or Props: matching neutral cardigans, small hair accessories, and a simple phone case. Relationship Mood: natural affectionate closeness, casual smile, relaxed modern date energy. Identity Rule: preserve face shape, hairstyle impression, age impression, and relative height from the reference. Subject: Make two people from the uploaded photo the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in cozy cafe window selfie with warm reflections and subtle phone framing. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use selfie or reference-photo transformation framing that preserves face, proportions, pose logic, and relationship spacing. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in cute Korean webtoon couple illustration with clean linework and soft blush shading. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use the color system named or implied by the original prompt, anchored by: Transform the uploaded photo into a cute hand-painted Korean webtoon illustration of a happy couple taking a selfie outdoors. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

imagePrompts.title: Outdoor Webtoon Selfie Transform Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable reference selfie transform with reference-aware transformation that keeps identity and pose logic while changing style, setting, wardrobe, or finish. Transform the uploaded photo into a cute hand-painted Korean webtoon illustration of a happy couple taking a selfie outdoors. Soft pastel color palette, round expressive eyes, rosy cheeks, warm smiles, cozy romantic atmosphere, charming doodle elements floating around them (. reference identity preservation. selfie framing Reference Subjects: the same subjects from the uploaded reference image. Transformation. Style: rounded storybook 3D animation look with gentle skin texture and soft lighting. Selfie Setting: clean bathroom mirror selfie with pastel tiles, indirect daylight, and realistic phone reflection. Wardrobe Or Props: fresh casual outfits, simple jewelry, towel rack and sink details kept tidy. Relationship Mood: playful candid confidence without caricature or exaggerated romance. Identity Rule: use only consented references and keep likeness stable without copying celebrities or branded characters. Subject: Make the same subjects from the uploaded reference image the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in clean bathroom mirror selfie with pastel tiles, indirect daylight, and realistic phone reflection. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use selfie or reference-photo transformation framing that preserves face, proportions, pose logic, and relationship spacing. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in rounded storybook 3D animation look with gentle skin texture and soft lighting. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use the color system named or implied by the original prompt, anchored by: Transform the uploaded photo into a cute hand-painted Korean webtoon illustration of a happy couple taking a selfie outdoors.
